title: Typed Async Work, Platform APIs, and Cancellation · Independent Type Trial
summary: Coordinate public-data requests, cancellation, retries, and UI state across browser and server boundaries. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a typed cancellable data coordinator with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model promise fulfillment values and rejection handling without pretending rejected types are encoded in Promise.
Predict async return inference and retain discriminated result relationships across awaits.
Propagate AbortSignal and distinguish cancellation, timeout, transport, parsing, and domain failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
